opportunities.title: Receipt image preview in dashboard table rows
opportunities.description: The thumbnail/file proxy routes already exist but are not wired into the dashboard UI. Adding a clickable thumbnail column or row-expand preview is a quick win that immediately improves usability — users can verify OCR accuracy at a glance.
opportunities.rationale: Highest ratio opportunity. Infrastructure (API routes for file proxy and thumbnails) already exists. Only UI work needed — add an image column to the data table or a lightbox on row click. Minimal risk.

opportunities.title: CSV/DATEV export for accounting handoff
opportunities.description: Add export functionality to download receipt data as CSV (with DATEV-compatible format for German bookkeeping). The data is already structured with SKR03 categories and Konto numbers — just needs serialization and a download button.
opportunities.rationale: High value for the target audience (German business users needing SKR03/DATEV integration). All data fields already exist in the table. Implementation is straightforward CSV generation + download trigger.

opportunities.title: PDF receipt scanning support
opportunities.description: Accept PDF uploads alongside images. Convert PDF pages to images for OCR processing, or extract text directly from text-layer PDFs. Critical feature gap vs. every major competitor.
opportunities.rationale: Very high value — PDF receipts are ubiquitous (email invoices, digital purchases). Moderate cost: need PDF rendering (pdf.js or server-side conversion), but the downstream OCR + classification pipeline stays the same.

opportunities.title: Error handling and retry for failed OCR/classification
opportunities.description: Add visible error states, retry buttons, and partial-result handling to the upload flow. Currently failures are silent or opaque.
opportunities.rationale: Solid ratio. Improves perceived reliability without major architectural changes. Touches upload page and API route error handling.

opportunities.title: Add unit tests for extraction and classification logic
opportunities.description: The project has zero tests. Add unit tests for extract-receipt-fields.ts and classification-rules.ts — both are pure functions with clear inputs/outputs. Enables confident refactoring for future evolution cycles.
opportunities.rationale: Testing infrastructure is a force multiplier for all future work. These two files are pure functions — ideal test targets. No mocking needed for the core logic.

opportunities.title: Batch/multi-receipt upload
opportunities.description: Allow uploading multiple receipt files at once and processing them in parallel. Reduces friction for bulk expense entry.
opportunities.rationale: High value but moderate cost — needs queue management, parallel processing, progress UI for multiple items. Worth doing after single-receipt flow is more robust (tests, error handling).

opportunities.title: Evaluate multimodal LLM as single-call OCR+classification replacement
opportunities.description: Replace the two-step Google Vision OCR + OpenRouter classification pipeline with a single multimodal LLM call (e.g., Claude, GPT-4o) that processes the receipt image and returns structured JSON directly.
opportunities.rationale: High value (fewer API calls, better accuracy, simpler code) but significant cost — requires testing accuracy across receipt types, fallback handling, and potentially changing API providers. Best done as a spike/evaluation first.

opportunities.title: PWA manifest and mobile camera capture
opportunities.description: Add service worker, manifest.json, and camera-capture input for mobile-first receipt scanning. Enable install-to-homescreen.
opportunities.rationale: Strong value for the use case (receipt scanning is mobile-first) but moderate effort for proper PWA implementation with offline support.

filtered_out.reason: Fraud detection / duplicate flagging (value 6, cost 4, ratio 1.5) — reasonable but lower priority than core feature gaps. ML-based fraud detection is over-scoped for a single cycle. Simple duplicate detection could be a quick add-on to export or upload flow later.

Multi-currency support (value 6, cost 5, ratio 1.2) — requires currency API integration, exchange rate lookups, and UI changes across the table. Deferred until core features (PDF, export, batch) are solid.
